Meta.defaultDescription: Direction before action. ORYEN shows where sales, marketing and follow-up lose results.

cases.title: What had to fit first.
cases.intro:
We share detailed case stories on request. Much of our work sits under confidentiality — it deliberately does not appear here.

We work with international companies and brands, and with smaller local businesses alike. The approach stays the same: see clearly what is at play before you invest in execution.

Direction and sharp focus before execution — below is a selection of recently published work.

about.title: Independent. Strategic. Brand and results.
about.intro: ORYEN exists to restore direction where marketing, sales and digital drift apart.

contact.title: A concrete first conversation, not a long intake.
contact.intro: Tell us briefly what is at stake. We look at whether a Reality Check — or another first conversation — makes sense.

thankYou.title: Your message was received.
thankYou.intro: You will hear personally from Christophe as soon as there is a substantive reply.

Errors.notFound: This page does not exist or has been moved.

Cases.empty: No published case studies here yet — that says little about the work running in the background. Ask us for references that match your sector or context.
